content: agent2: implementing 'Add Template Path Transformation Support' (path_transform param) in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Will touch FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader in that file. Let me know if you're touching loaders.py too.
